meta.task: VYPOCET-21 TEST H5g-1 (BRAINSTORM-05): does the 4D truncated area-law SSEE S~sqrt(N) ITSELF separate type II_1 from II_inf?
meta.dimension: 4D de Sitter static patch (conformal sech^2 radial slab (t, r*, x1, x2); 4D link-matrix Green on the flat order)
meta.geometry: static patch in tortoise r*=l arctanh(r/l) + transverse box; dS PROPER measure dN ~ sech^2(r*/l) dt dr* dx1 dx2 (radial sech^2, transverse flat) vs matched flat radial-box control.
meta.conformal_weight_caveat: 4D massless scalar is NOT conformally invariant: the conformal factor does NOT drop out of the exact propagator. This is the SAME controlled approximation as VYPOCET-19's 2D conformal trick lifted to 4D -- it PRESERVES the flat causal structure in (t,r*,x1,x2) and the dS proper MEASURE (sech^2 => bounded point budget = II_1 signal), but NOT the exact curved 4D Wightman function. Tests the geometric II_1 vs II_inf boundedness in the truncated area-law SSEE, not the exact dS propagator.
meta.n_max_F019: n_max = 2 N^(3/4) (Surya-Nomaan-X-Yazdi 2008.07697; 4D area-law rank; validated VYPOCET-06 / vn-type-slab-4d).

conventions.proper_measure: dN ~ sech^2(r*/l) dt dr* dx1 dx2 (radial sech^2)
conventions.G_R_4D: K_R = a L, a = sqrt(rho)/(2 pi sqrt6) (Johnston 0909.0944)
conventions.SSEE: W_O v = mu iDelta_O v ; S = sum mu ln|mu| ; pairs (mu,1-mu)
conventions.n_max: 2 N^(3/4) rank truncation (keep top n_max +/- modes)

references.dS_2D: VYPOCET-19 / F-023 (2D dS: only content discriminates)
references.area_law_4D: VYPOCET-06 / F-019 (4D type-II area law S~sqrt(N))

part1_H5g1_truncated_area_law_discrimina.description: H5g-1 discriminator: 4D TRUNCATED area-law SSEE (n_max=2 N^(3/4), F-019) across a GROWING bulk r* cut (radial extent = cut_frac * R*_box, x1=0 half-space face) vs the radial box edge R*_box -> horizon, at fixed proper density. STRONG H5g-1: the truncated SSEE ALONE separates II_1 (dS: S saturates as the bounded patch is exhausted) from II_inf (flat control: S grows) -- unlike 2D (F-023) where only region content discriminated.

part2_area_law_scaling.description: 4D area-law scaling cross-check at FIXED dS sub-region (increasing N): truncated SSEE (n_max=2 N^(3/4)) follows the 4D type-II area law S ~ N^a, a ~ 1/2 (F-019); full SSEE is volume/divergent (III). Confirms the truncation is the operative area-law regulator on the dS patch.

VERDICT.overall: PARTIAL H5g-1: the 4D truncated area-law SSEE DOES show a real, 4D-specific separation that did NOT exist in 2D -- the dS truncated S rises ~3.0x more SHALLOWLY than the flat control (dS exponent a=0.27 vs flat a=0.52 in R*_box), reflecting the sech^2 proper-area cap -- but it does NOT fully SATURATE at the accessible N (the growing entangling cut at fixed density still adds dS sub-region points), so the clean saturation-vs-growth of STRONG H5g-1 is not reached. The region content (N_total cap R2=1.0, S_full) discriminates II_1 from II_inf decisively, exactly as 2D F-023.

h5g6_input: F-023 (2D: only content discriminates) + F-019 (4D area law S~sqrt(N)) + THIS RESULT together support a dS SECTION in draft-04, NOT yet a standalone draft-05. The 4D truncated area-law SSEE shows a GENUINE new separation absent in 2D (dS rises ~3.0x more shallowly than flat; dS R*-exponent 0.27 vs flat 0.52), and the content discriminator (N_total cap R2=1.0 vs linear flat growth) cleanly lifts F-023 to 4D. But the truncated entropy does not fully SATURATE at the dense-eigh-accessible N<=2500: the F-019 fixed-region area-law exponent comes out a=0.72 (above the clean 0.5; dS radial geometry steepens it), and the horizon-approach dS S still creeps up because the growing-cut-at-fixed-density adds dS points faster than the sech^2 cap removes them. Decision: present as a dS SECTION in draft-04 (crossed-product/vN-type), pairing the 2D+4D content discriminator with the PARTIAL 4D truncated-entropy signal, and flag the clean-saturation test as needing larger N (sparse/iterative eigensolvers, rho>~10^3, larger l, or a fixed-area entangling cut with a denser radial horizon sweep) before it can carry a standalone draft-05. The conformal-weight caveat (4D scalar not conformally invariant; causal structure + measure preserved, exact propagator not) must be stated honestly either way.
